tools.name: select-sales-metric
tools.description: Tool to select input data for sales report generation and visualization. Interactive UI for selecting region, sales metrics (like revenue, orders, conversion rate, AOV, CLV, and more.) and time periods (monthly/quarterly).

tools.name: get-sales-data
tools.description: Fetch sales report data for given states, metric, period, and year. Returns structured report with summary, period breakdown, and state-level data.

tools.name: visualize-sales-data
tools.description: Visualize sales report data as interactive charts (bar, line, doughnut). Accepts the structured data previously generated by sales_metric_selector. Shows period breakdown, state distribution, and state comparison charts.

selections.description: The selections object from sales_metric_selector output

stateNames.description: Ordered state names for column headers

report.description: The report object from sales_metric_selector output

tools.name: show-sales-pdf-report
tools.description: Generate a downloadable PDF report with tables and charts from sales data. Accepts the structured data previously generated by sales_metric_selector. The PDF includes summary table, period breakdown chart and table, and state comparison chart and table.

selections.description: The selections object from sales_metric_selector output

stateNames.description: Ordered state names for column headers

report.description: The report object from sales_metric_selector output

resources.name: sales-metric-input-ui
resources.description: Interactive sales metrics selector with regions, metrics, and time periods

resources.name: sales-data-visualization-ui
resources.description: Interactive sales data visualization with charts

resources.name: sales-pdf-report-ui
resources.description: PDF report download UI for sales data
